zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hynton於1385年出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 伊斯頓時，他的父親Thomas de Hynton25歲，母親Lady Jane Webb20歲。他和Margaret Golaffre至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1450年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾金斯頓 李爾享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hynton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Heinsen  , a habitational name from any of the three places called Heinsen in Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Hinson
meanings: English: patronymic meaning ‘son of the hind’, from Middle English hine ‘household servant, agricultural laborer’, perhaps also ‘farm manager’ (see Hine ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hynton was born in 1385, in Great Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Hynton, was 25 and his mother, Lady Jane Webb, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Margaret Golaffre. He registered for military service in 1415. He died in 1450, in Kingston Lisle, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hyntonが1385年にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト エアストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Hyntonは25歳，母Lady Jane Webbは20歳であった。彼はMargaret Golaffreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1450年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキングストン リスルで65歳で死去した。

ko.Battle of Agincourt: 캐나다 앨버타 캄로즈 카운티 노. 2 바틀
ko.lifeSummary: John de Hynton(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Hynton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Webb(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Margaret Golaffre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Battle of Agincourt: баттл, камрос коунти но. 2, Альберта, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hynton родился в 1385 г. в местности грит эастон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Hynton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Webb, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Margaret Golaffre. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности кингстон лисл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Hynton nació en 1385, en Great Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Hynton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Webb, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Margaret Golaffre. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió en 1450, en Kingston Lisle, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
